findings.title: Account deletion path is not obvious
findings.description: Deletion action is under nested settings and may be hard for reviewer to locate.
findings.suggestion: Expose account deletion from top-level account page and add review note.

findings.title: Permission rationale can be clearer
findings.description: Camera permission rationale does not mention user benefit clearly.
findings.suggestion: Add explicit user value and fallback behavior in rationale text.

findings.title: Reviewer account provided
findings.description: Credentials are documented in release notes.
